SELECT radians(90) AS radians_90, radians(180) AS radians_180, radians(270) AS radians_270 FROM degrees_table;
SELECT radians(360) + radians(0) AS full_circle FROM degrees_table;
SELECT radians(45) * 2 AS double_45_degrees FROM degrees_table;
WITH (SELECT radians(angle) FROM degrees_table) AS radian_values SELECT MAX(radian_values) AS max_radian FROM degrees_table;
CREATE TABLE angles (id Int32, angle FLOAT);
SELECT a.id, radians(a.angle) AS radians_value FROM angles AS a JOIN degrees_table AS d ON a.angle = d.angle;
SELECT SUM(radians(angle)) AS total_radians FROM degrees_table;
SELECT radians(angle) * radians(angle) AS radians_squared FROM degrees_table WHERE angle > 0;
